series_metadata.series_description: Copy of program code, program flowcharts, maintenance logs, system change notices, design documents, specifications, and other records that document computer programs and the modifications made to computer programs.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until all data in system has been migrated or destroyed; then destroy ; Electronic: Retain until all data in system has been migrated or destroyed; then destroy, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
